name: butterfly-radio
description: 本地私有化 AI 电台

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "sleep 3 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build:electron: cd electron-main && npm run build && npm run package
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron
scripts.package:win: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && cd electron-main && npm run package:win
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && cd electron-main && npm run package:mac
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && pnpm install && cd ../electron-main && npm install && cd ../python-backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
